form.formComment: Racing well recently. Most recently came from midfield; 3rd of 13 at Hawera on March 25 over 1600m, 6 len behind Kingsbrook Diva carrying 58.5kg at $9.30. Before that 2nd of 11 at Wanganui on March 14 over 1340m, slow going 0.5 len behind Lucky Penny with 56.5kg at $28.60. Should be at his top now and is capable of taking this out.
